response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer across multiple companies and technologies, including large-scale systems and distributed infrastructure. While his resume highlights strong leadership in mentoring and open-source contributions, it lacks explicit evidence of technical leadership in cloud compute platforms or managing large-scale infrastructure projects directly aligned with the role's core responsibilities. His background in C++ is minimal (only mentioned briefly in early roles), which is a key requirement.
strengths: Extensive experience in large-scale systems and distributed infrastructure (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Proven leadership in mentoring and technical guidance (e.g., organizing Refactoring Dojos, Selenium courses, and workshops)
Strong track record in open-source contributions and community engagement (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Dlang libraries)
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ (only early roles mention it, not recent or leadership-focused)
No explicit mention of cloud architecture or compute platform leadership (core to the role)
Lack of production-level cloud architecture experience balancing short- and long-term needs (preferred qualification)
